name: Aucfan Co., Ltd.
summary: Aucfan Co., Ltd. operates aucfan.com, a site for shopping and auction statistical price comparison in Japan. The company allows users to compare, search, and analyze auction, and shopping product and price information, as well as to see the prices and number of previous transactions. It serves corporate clients, sole proprietors, and individuals. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
